attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
		TVOUTPUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ,
		COALESCE(MAX(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT - INTERVAL '1' DAY) OVER 
			(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ROWS BETWEEN 1
			FOLLOWING AND 1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
		TVOUTPUT.ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,
		TVOUTPUT.NODE_TYPE, 
		TVOUTPUT.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
		TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE,
		ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID ORDER BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC)
			AS RANK_INDEX,
		(CASE WHEN RANK_INDEX = 1 AND NFAHNT_OUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'U' ELSE 'I' END) 
			AS DML_TYPE
	FROM
	(
		SELECT	
			ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
			START_TV_DT,
			ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,
			NODE_TYPE,
			PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
			EDW_CREATE_DTM,
			ACTION_CODE,
			EXCEPTION_TYPE,
			ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID, NODE_TYPE,ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
			ORDER	BY EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) AS ROW_NUM
		FROM(
	
		SELECT
				STACCT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1 AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
				STACCT.START_TV_DT,
				STACCT.ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,
				STACCT.NODE_TYPE,
				STACCT.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
				STACCT.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
				'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
				'NE' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM
			(
						SELECT 
					CAST(SCA_DR.account_id AS VARCHAR(50))  AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1
					,CAST('Asset'  AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
					,CAST('MIDDLE' AS VARCHAR(6)) AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('4' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
					FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS SCA_DR
					,$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS SCA_PR1
					,$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS SCA_PR2 
					WHERE SCA_DR.cap_account_id IN (2,3) 
					AND SCA_PR1.parent_acct_id = SCA_DR.cap_account_id 
					AND SCA_PR1.cap_account_id = SCA_PR2.parent_acct_id
					GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
					UNION ALL
					 SELECT 
					CAST(SCA_PR1.account_id AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1
					,CAST(SCA_DR.account_id AS VARCHAR(50))   AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
					,CAST('LEAF' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('5' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
					FROM $$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS SCA_DR
					,$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS SCA_PR1
					,$$STGDB.ST_CAP_ACCOUNTS SCA_PR2 
					WHERE SCA_DR.cap_account_id IN (2,3) 
					AND SCA_PR1.parent_acct_id = SCA_DR.cap_account_id 
					AND SCA_PR1.cap_account_id = SCA_PR2.parent_acct_id
					GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6
UNION ALL
				SELECT 
					 CAST('ALL' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1
					,CAST('NO PARENT' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
					,CAST('ROOT' AS CHAR(6)) AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('1' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
				FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SI_ACCOUNT_TYPE
				GROUP BY ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1, PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID, NODE_TYPE, ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT, START_TV_DT, 
	                           EDW_CREATE_DTM
				UNION ALL
				SELECT 
					 CAST('INCOME STATEMENT'AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1
					,CAST('ALL' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
					,'MIDDLE' AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('2' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
				FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SI_ACCOUNT_TYPE
				GROUP BY ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1, PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID, NODE_TYPE, ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT, START_TV_DT, 
	                           EDW_CREATE_DTM
	                        UNION ALL
				SELECT 
					 CAST('BALANCE SHEET'AS VARCHAR(50)) AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1
					,CAST('ALL' AS VARCHAR(50)) AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
					,'MIDDLE' AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('2' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
				FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_SI_ACCOUNT_TYPE
				GROUP BY ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1, PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID, NODE_TYPE, ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT, START_TV_DT, 
	                           EDW_CREATE_DTM
	
				UNION ALL
				SELECT 
					 ESATAT.ACCOUNT_TYPE_DESC AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1
					,CASE WHEN ESATAT.ACCOUNT_TYPE_DESC IN ('Expense','Revenue') 
	                                      THEN 'INCOME STATEMENT' 
	                                      ELSE 'BALANCE SHEET' 
	                                  END AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
					,'MIDDLE' AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('3' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFATAT,
				      $$ETLVWDB.EL_SI_ACCOUNT_TYPE ESATAT
				WHERE NFATAT.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE   = CAST(ESATAT.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID AS CHAR(1))
				  AND NFATAT.end_tv_date =16000101
				GROUP BY ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1, PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID, NODE_TYPE, ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT, START_TV_DT, 
	                           EDW_CREATE_DTM
                  UNION ALL
                  SELECT 
					 CASE WHEN CLASSIFICATION_DESC IS NULL AND ESATD.ACCOUNT_TYPE_DESC = 'Expense' THEN 'Non Expense SSOT Other'
	 				      ELSE EEEABD.CLASSIFICATION_DESC
					 END  AS ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1 
					,ESATD.ACCOUNT_TYPE_DESC AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
					,'MIDDLE' AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('4' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFATD
				JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_SI_ACCOUNT_TYPE ESATD
				  ON  NFATD.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE   = CAST(ESATD.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID AS CHAR(1))
				LEFT OUTER JOIN 
				(
				   SELECT EEEA.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID,EEEA.ACCOUNT_ID,EEAB.DESCRIPTION,EAC.CLASSIFICATION_CODE ,EAC.CLASSIFICATION_DESC
				   FROM 
				   $$ETLVWDB.EL_ET_EXPENSE_ACCOUNTS EEEA
					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ET_ACCOUNT_BUCKETS EEAB
				     ON  EEEA.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID=EEAB.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID
				   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION EAC  
				   	ON EEAB.DISCRETIONARY = EAC.CLASSIFICATION_CODE 
				 )EEEABD
				ON NFATD.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = EEEABD.ACCOUNT_ID 
				GROUP BY ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1, PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID, NODE_TYPE, ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT, START_TV_DT, 
	                           EDW_CREATE_DTM
	                        WHERE ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1 IS NOT NULL
	                          AND NFATD.end_tv_date =16000101
                               UNION ALL
				SELECT 
					 EEEABAB.DESCRIPTION  AS  ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1
					,CASE WHEN EEEABAB.CLASSIFICATION_DESC  IS NULL AND ESATAB.ACCOUNT_TYPE_DESC = 'Expense'
					       THEN 'Non Expense SSOT Other'
	 				      ELSE EEEABAB.CLASSIFICATION_DESC  
					 END   AS PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID  
					,'LEAF' AS NODE_TYPE
					,CAST('5' AS INTEGER) AS ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
					,CURRENT_DATE AS START_TV_DT
					,NFATAB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME  AS EDW_CREATE_DTM
				FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TV NFATAB
				JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_SI_ACCOUNT_TYPE ESATAB
				ON NFATAB.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_TYPE  = CAST(ESATAB.ACCOUNT_TYPE_ID AS CHAR(1))
				LEFT OUTER JOIN 
				(
				   SELECT EEEA.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID,EEEA.ACCOUNT_ID,EEAB.DESCRIPTION,EAC.CLASSIFICATION_CODE ,EAC.CLASSIFICATION_DESC
				   FROM 
				   $$ETLVWDB.EL_ET_EXPENSE_ACCOUNTS EEEA
					INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_ET_ACCOUNT_BUCKETS EEAB
				     ON  EEEA.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID=EEAB.ACCOUNT_BUCKET_ID
				   LEFT OUTER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_ACCOUNT_CLASSIFICATION EAC  
				   	ON EEAB.DISCRETIONARY = EAC.CLASSIFICATION_CODE 
				 )EEEABAB
				ON NFATAB.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = EEEABAB.ACCOUNT_ID 
				GROUP BY ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1, PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID, NODE_TYPE, ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT, START_TV_DT, 
	                            EDW_CREATE_DTM	
	                        WHERE ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID1 IS NOT NULL
	                        AND NFATAB.end_tv_date =16000101
			)STACCT
			UNION	ALL
			SELECT	
				     NFAHNT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
				     NFAHNT.START_TV_DT,
				     NFAHNT.ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,
				     NFAHNT.NODE_TYPE,
				     NFAHNT.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,
				     NFAHNT.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
				     'X' ACTION_CODE,
				     'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
			FROM	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCT_HIER_NODE_TV  NFAHNT 
			where END_TV_DT =16000101 
		)TVINPUT
		QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TVINPUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID,ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
		ORDER BY TVINPUT.EDW_CREATE_DTM DESC) =1	
	) TVOUTPUT
	LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCT_HIER_NODE_TV NFAHNT_OUT
		ON	 TVOUTPUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID = NFAHNT_OUT.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
		AND   TVOUTPUT.ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = NFAHNT_OUT.ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT
		AND	NFAHNT_OUT.END_TV_DT =16000101
	WHERE	TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM = 1
